entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Annual food legume also known as groundnut, used for oil, snacks, and fodder

entities.name: ARACHIS
entities.description: Genus of plants originating in South America containing about 83 species

entities.name: SOUTH AMERICA
entities.description: Region where the genus Arachis originated

entities.name: ARGENTINA
entities.description: Primary center of diversity for the genus Arachis

entities.name: BOLIVIA
entities.description: Primary center of diversity for the genus Arachis

entities.name: BRAZIL
entities.description: Primary center of diversity for the genus Arachis

entities.name: PARAGUAY
entities.description: Primary center of diversity for the genus Arachis

entities.name: URUGUAY
entities.description: Primary center of diversity for the genus Arachis

entities.name: NATURAL HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: Process between two wild Arachis species that led to the origin of Arachis hypogaea

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: Process following the origin of Arachis hypogaea that led to its spread worldwide

entities.name: TETRAPLOID
entities.description: Genomic state characterized by four sets of chromosomes, applicable to Arachis hypogaea

entities.name: DIPLOID
entities.description: Genomic state characterized by two sets of chromosomes, applicable to many wild Arachis species

entities.name: ANEUPLOID
entities.description: Genomic state with an abnormal number of chromosomes, present in some Arachis species

entities.name: GERMPLASM COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Preserved collections of cultivated and wild species used for genetic diversity

entities.name: GENE BANKS
entities.description: Facilities where germplasm collections are preserved

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The primary source of genetic variation used for peanut improvement

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: Crossing between different species used to develop improved peanut cultivars

entities.name: MOLECULAR INVESTIGATIONS
entities.description: Studies using molecular tools to investigate peanut genetic resources

entities.name: GENOMIC INVESTIGATIONS
entities.description: Studies using genomic tools to investigate peanut genetic resources

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: Economically important trait referring to the amount of crop produced

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: Ability of the crop to withstand water-limited conditions

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: Ability of the crop to resist attacks from diseases

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The value of the crop in terms of nutrients

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: Long-term ability of the crop to withstand pests, pathogens, and climate change

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Harmful organisms that affect peanut crops

entities.name: PATHOGENS
entities.description: Disease-causing organisms that affect peanut crops

entities.name: CHANGING CLIMATE
entities.description: Environmental shifts that impact crop stability and resilience
